notes:
I have tried every Proton version, I did run Proton tricks like suggested, also that does not work. After using Protontricks dotnet6desktop, Proton 5.13-6 seems the game to launch, but after the voice says ¨Welcome to my house" you have to click on the house and that´s it. The screen turns black with an exception of the little clock at the left side of your screen. 

Sad story, the free DLC of the regular game does work on the deck, but only on half of the screen in a very poor quality.
Launches cleanly and plays well with winetricks and dotnet40
